description: Computer-use MCP for Windows 10/11: 29 tools — screenshot, UIA, Chrome CDP, type/click/scroll, VBA.
name: io.github.Harusame64/desktop-touch-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Set to '0' to disable automatic action guards (reverts to v0.11.12 behavior).
environmentVariables.name: DESKTOP_TOUCH_AUTO_GUARD

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to enable MCP perception resources.
environmentVariables.name: DESKTOP_TOUCH_PERCEPTION_RESOURCES

environmentVariables.description: Idle ms before the WinEvent sidecar enters dormancy (default 60000).
environmentVariables.name: DESKTOP_TOUCH_PERCEPTION_IDLE_MS

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to keep the WinEvent sidecar always running (no auto-dormancy).
environmentVariables.name: DESKTOP_TOUCH_PERCEPTION_DORMANCY_DISABLE

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to disable the JSONL diagnostic event log (issue #365 Phase 2).
environmentVariables.name: DESKTOP_TOUCH_DIAGNOSTIC_LOG_DISABLE

environmentVariables.description: Override path for the diagnostic event log.
environmentVariables.name: DESKTOP_TOUCH_DIAGNOSTIC_LOG_PATH
